description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beverage can, featuring a blue exterior with simple geometric graphics. The front displays three upward-pointing green chevrons, while the opposite side has a bold yellow lightning bolt design. The can has a metallic top with a circular pull tab, and both the top and bottom rims are silver. Subtle dents and creases are visible on the body, indicating it has been discarded and possibly crushed. The surface is slightly reflective, with a smooth, glossy finish typical of drink cans. No brand logos or text are present, and there is no visible barcode.
description: A blue aluminum beverage can with green chevrons and a yellow lightning bolt, showing dents and a metallic pull tab.
description_view_0: Front view shows three green chevrons on a blue background, with visible dents and the metallic top.
description_view_1: Side view with partial chevrons visible on the left edge and a large dent in the center of the blue surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side features a yellow lightning bolt graphic on blue, with creases and the metallic top visible.
description_view_3: Side view with the edge of the yellow lightning bolt visible, blue surface, and a prominent crease.
attribute_rust_or_damage_marks: Multiple dents and creases are visible on the blue body, especially on the front and sides.
